headline: Why Needham Analysts Slashed Their Price Targets on IBM Stock Ahead of Earnings
summary: IBM is seeing tempered targets from Needham as macro pressures linger, though growth and margins remain steady.

raw.headline: Why Needham Analysts Slashed Their Price Targets on IBM Stock Ahead of Earnings
raw.summary: IBM is seeing tempered targets from Needham as macro pressures linger, though growth and margins remain steady.

headline: Why is quantum computing seen as a challenge to Bitcoin?
summary: Investing.com -- The rise of cryptographically relevant quantum computers (CRQCs) is no longer a distant "decade away" concern, but for Bitcoin and the broader digital asset ecosystem, the threat appears manageable.
